title: Verdict-surface contract: 3-underscore sentinel leak must be rejected
invariant: verdict surface is a typed value, not a transport-layer string the model must spell
rationale: Pilot bots repeatedly emitted '__CC_CONNECT_SILENT_PASS___' (3 trailing underscores) into Discord — a direct violation of Constitution Principle II. The adapter must reject any malformed-sentinel output as a contract failure.
